mapper.select: SELECT B_ID, B_CATEGORY, B_CC, B_TITLE, B_CONTENT, B_CREATED_ID, B_CREATED_DATE, B_UPDATED_ID, B_UPDATED_DATE, B_VIEWS FROM BOARD ORDER BY B_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( B_CATEGORY, B_CC, B_TITLE, B_CONTENT, B_CREATED_ID, B_CREATED_DATE, B_VIEWS ) VALUES ( #{B_CATEGORY}, #{B_CC}, #{B_TITLE}, #{B_CONTENT}, #{B_CREATED_ID}, SYSDATE, #{B_VIEWS})
